feature_status.hla_loh_cross_validation: implemented via neoag-v03 crosscheck-hla-loh for LOHHLA + SpecHLA normalized tables

notes: release_manifest.json is external release metadata and is intentionally not embedded in the tarball to avoid archive self-hash mismatch.
The tarball is accompanied by an external .sha256 file and external package manifest JSON.
Patient-specific scripts and site-local absolute paths are excluded from the online package rather than deleted from the working analysis tree.
README.md now embeds the installation, external tool, reference data, dependency matrix, acceptance, and troubleshooting guide.
README.md embeds common run commands for demo, raw intermediates, evidence sidecars, HLA LOH cross-check, reports, and Nextflow fixture runs.
README.md embeds the installation, external tool, reference data, dependency matrix, acceptance, and troubleshooting guide.
README.md includes sliding-window variant peptide extraction through run-full ranking commands.
README.md includes configuration file guidance for conf/tools.env.sh, local overrides, site config, run TOMLs, key variables, and private-file boundaries.
ASCAT v3.2.0 is available through conda/env.neoag-ascat-v3.yml and bin/ascat-v3 --check; ASCAT 2.5.2 remains as the legacy baseline.
README_zh.md has been synchronized to README.md for the online release package.

external_required: Nextflow runtime cache for offline runs

nextflow.offline_boundary: offline use must pre-stage Java, populated NXF_HOME, conda/container assets, tools, and references
nextflow.online_boundary: bin/nextflow may download runtime dependencies into NXF_HOME on first online use

package_forbidden_path_scan.summary: online package generated with exclusion rules for tools/results/work/dist/conda_packs/.git/.venv/.nextflow, patient tokens, site-local absolute paths, docx/pptx, and local env files

pytest_default.scope: release-safe unit and contract checks; skips integration, benchmark, external-tool, and long workflow tests by default

pytest_run_all.scope: maintainer/release verification mode; opts into integration, benchmark, external-tool, and longer workflow tests; requires installed tools, references, and writable Nextflow cache

pytest_targeted_rna_hla.summary: RNA VAF, splice/fusion targeted validation, and HLA LOH crosscheck tests: 5 passed, 13 skipped in targeted rerun

unpacked_package_targeted_rna_hla.summary: unpacked online package RNA VAF, splice/fusion targeted validation, and HLA LOH crosscheck tests: 5 passed, 13 skipped
